ground_truth.title: Affordable Social Media Marketing Packages
ground_truth.main_content: Social Media Packages. Flexible social media marketing services crafted for your goals. Freedom, flexibility and growth – The cornerstones of modern social media marketing services. Our evolved social media marketing packages give you the freedom and flexibility to adapt to the changing tides of the social media world. Whether you are looking to grow your audience on Facebook, generate leads on LinkedIn, or sell products on Pinterest, our social media experts have years of experience exceeding goals for our clients. With years of experience under our belt, we have been able to work with so many businesses across a diverse range of industries, building brand awareness with high-quality posts and effective ad campaigns. And we understand that you know your business best, but social media marketing can be a lot to tackle on your own as a business owner. That's why we'll work together to develop your brand's voice, locate your target audience and create a comprehensive strategy for the social media platforms that make the most sense for your business. Let our team help you find the social media package that complements your goals and budget. Our affordable social media marketing packages offer numerous ways to grow your business with results-focused plans. Whether you are the owner of a small business or large corporation, our marketing team has created powerful strategies for affordable prices. Listed below, we feature a few of our common social media packages that fit many of our customers' needs, but we also offer custom social media marketing plans tailored for your business. SMM Essentials - A low-risk solution for SMM growth - perfect for small businesses & start-ups - starting at $249/mo. SMM Standard - Modern, cutting edge social strategies – all executed for a reasonable price - starting at $449/mo. SMM Premium - For companies ready for an advanced, wide-reaching & dominate approach to SMM - starting at $549/mo. SMM Custom - When only the best will do - We offer full-service SMM packages to achieve your goals - starting at $1249/mo. From day one, Mainstreethost has opened a new chapter for Yellowstone Safari Company with their excellent social media services that transformed our company's visibility and greatly improved our success in the virtual marketplace. We are grateful for the professional team that skillfully tends to our needs and understands our goals. Social Media Marketing Strategies. Having a social media presence is an essential part of your business. Harnessing the power of social media marketing provides a proven strategy for engaging your audience, tapping into new markets and growing your business. When looking for a social media marketing company, you have plenty of options. Our agency has a history of creating highly targeted, effective social media campaigns that deliver results. We believe in developing flexible social media campaigns that are focused on results. This means defining your businesses goals then creating a strategy to help you get there. Our flexibility allows our team to adapt our tactics, enhancing your social campaigns. Increase Conversions: Maximize your social media marketing for bottom line growth. Are you selling online? Social media marketing is an effective method of getting your goods & services in front of potential customers. Whether that's targeting ads, demonstrating social proof, promoting user-generated content (UGC) or addressing customers questions. Utilizing our experience, research and industry expertise, our team strategically targets your audience on social networks to drive conversions. Driving conversions, the social way: Social advertising, Social proof, User-generated content (UGC), Addressing fears, Content creation, Landing page optimization. Brand Awareness: Getting your name known to the masses is a daunting responsibility. Being 'top of mind' within your target market is a proven strategy for sustained growth. Brand awareness is purely the extent to which your target market is familiar with your brands products or services. Social media marketing offers an inbound method of promoting your brand through thoughtful posts, engaging with your audience and the delivery of a consistent brand image. Our social media marketing brand awareness campaigns have helped businesses increase: Customer loyalty, Followers, Engagement, Word-of-mouth marketing, Top-of-mind awareness, Brand equity. Drive Traffic: Driving traffic to your website is a tricky task. Creating a presence that inspires action takes planning and social media marketing expertise. Increasing traffic from social media is all about engaging your audience while building relationships on each network. Understanding the nuances of every network can be a little exhausting but knowing how to create and promote content your audience will want to share is where our team excels. We drive social traffic to your website by creating: Shareable content, Inspiring visuals, SEO minded social, Audience engagement, Amplified content, Social promotion. Customer Service (Social Care): Social care, a social approach to creating a seamless customer experience. Modern customer service teams understand the value of providing support on social networks to quickly identify issues and answer questions. A multi-channel customer support approach is no longer a luxury but expected among consumers. Our team is here to help, whether you're new to social care, or need to take your platform to the next level. Social care platforms offer: Social media audits, Tracking, Monitoring systems, Social listening, Responses, Guidelines. Fresh on the Scene: Social media marketing requires a combination of strategy and creativity to be effective. Knowing where to start can be quite overwhelming. Understanding which networks your customers are on, generating quality content and engaging with your target audience on a consistent basis are just a few of the efforts required to manage successful social campaigns. Our team of social media marketers will help you hit the ground running with: Profile creation, Profile optimization, Posting, Content creation, Strategy, Social scheduling. 143% Increase in Social Conversions: This eCommerce store reached out to our team wanting to increase conversions from social media marketing. We designed and implemented a Facebook remarketing campaign using dynamic ads and generated a 143% increase in social media conversions and a 2040% return on ad spend (ROAS). Common Social Media Marketing Questions: Why should I invest in social media marketing? Social media is a useful tool to help businesses reach their target audience and connect with the right people. Being present on social media builds trust and strengthens brand reputation—you can use your pages to showcase your business, aid in customer service, and learn from a community of loyal followers. What role does social media marketing play in a digital marketing strategy? Social media acts as another channel of visibility for your business, allowing potential clients and loyal customers to connect with you and get to know your brand in a more personal way. From driving traffic to your website, to gaining valuable customer feedback, your social media presence helps to support, and ultimately strengthen, the overall digital marketing strategy for your business. What if I'm not on social media yet? That's no problem! We've helped plenty of clients with their social media setup—first figuring out which social media network to focus on for your business, then designing and optimizing your page to showcase your brand and drive traffic to your website. What industries do you work with? Over the years, we have had the pleasure of working on social media accounts for a myriad of different businesses. Our team is well-versed in the inner-workings of each social media platform and what it takes to nurture a community within most industry spaces. We are able to take our social media packages and adapt them to create a custom strategy that works for your unique business.
